purpose: Code-emission ω-cycle for nexus kick(ω-cycle). Consumes architecture witness next_cycle_handoff verbatim and emits the four implementation Tier-1s — registry directories + tool/kick_{tree,dispatch,bench}.hexa + cli/run.hexa cmd_kick wire + state/blockers/kick_template.hexa. Architecture-cycle F7 (architecture-only) is intentionally lifted; replaced by F7' (code-runs) + F7'' (tree-renders) + F7''' (no-mocks-for-noise).

tree_render_actual:
kick(ω-cycle)
├── core/
│   ├── intake (topic-string)
│   ├── falsifier_preregister (state/kick/registry/falsifiers_default.hexa + topic-specific)
│   ├── axis_fanout (parallel)
│   ├── tier1_gate (≤4 promotion + falsifier-pass-pattern required)
│   └── witness_emit (design/kick/<date>_<slug>_omega_cycle.json)
├── strata/                              [scan: state/kick/registry/strata/*.hexa]
│   ├── drill_batch  (L3, L3 drill_batch — fan-out across seeds (--seeds csv | --seeds-file path))
│   ├── drill  (L2, L2 drill — iterate × max_rounds with checkpoint/resume + adaptive depth)
│   ├── omega  (L_omega, L_ω apex — drill apex preset + L3 다축 (--engines/--variants/--seeds) 자동 dispatch)
│   ├── smash  (L1, L1 atomic single-phase blowup — single-shot blowup 9-phase 돌파 (no iteration))
│   └── surge  (L4, L4 surge — Cartesian product engines × variants × seeds fan-out)
├── axes/                                [scan: state/kick/registry/axes/*.hexa]
│   ├── design-strategy        (design-strategy axis — strategy-source + cross-repo-trawl-witness + multi-axis K≥3)
│   ├── falsifier-coverage        (falsifier-coverage axis — pre-registered falsifiers with explicit verdict_check populated)
│   ├── noise-distinguishability        (noise-distinguishability axis — every outside-noise injection hash-anchored + source-tagged)
│   └── perf-comparability        (perf-comparability axis — 5 named comparable axes across backends)
├── backends/                            [scan: state/kick/registry/backends/*.hexa]
│   ├── claude_code  (cli: claude; claude code cli — Anthropic CLI in headless -p mode)
│   ├── codex_cli  (cli: codex; codex cli — greenfield slot per architecture obs_1; probe at runtime)
│   └── gemini_cli  (cli: gemini; gemini cli — Google Gemini CLI (200K→2M context advantage))
└── noise_sources/                       [scan: state/kick/registry/noise_sources/*.hexa]
    ├── bridges/                         [16 entries from tool/bridge_health.sh BRIDGES list]
    │   ├── bridge_arxiv  → tool/arxiv_realtime_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_cmb  → tool/cmb_planck_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_codata  → tool/codata_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_gaia  → tool/gaia_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_gw  → tool/gw_observatory_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_horizons  → tool/horizons_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_icecube  → tool/icecube_neutrino_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_lhc  → tool/lhc_opendata_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_nanograv  → tool/nanograv_pulsar_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_nist_atomic  → tool/nist_atomic_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_oeis  → tool/oeis_live_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_openalex  → tool/openalex_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_pubchem  → tool/pubchem_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_simbad  → tool/simbad_bridge.hexa
    │   ├── bridge_uniprot  → tool/uniprot_bridge.hexa
    │   └── bridge_wikipedia  → tool/wikipedia_summary_bridge.hexa
    ├── qrng/
    │   └── qrng_anu_time  → sim_bridge/anu_time/universe.hexa  (urandom-fallback per OBSTRUCTION obs_2)
    └── absorbed/                        [grows monotonically per cycle — Tier-1s of prior kicks]
        └── (empty — populated as Tier-1 promotions accumulate across cycles)
__KICK_TREE__ PASS dirs=4 entries=29
